_note: Batch D (medieval Europe, 800-1400 AD): documented parents + full siblings for married-in spouses that had no ancestry shown. Each batch spouse is referenced by its EXISTING id inside a children array; new ancestors use the SPE_ prefix. Unknown mothers/fathers are '—' placeholders. Where maternity or paternity is genuinely disputed or saga-only it is flagged in the label. Only true full siblings (sharing BOTH listed parents) are added; half-siblings by other spouses are omitted. Verified against standard references (Wikipedia/Asser/Heimskringla) July 2026. AVOIDS DOUBLE-PARENTING: every batch id was checked to have no existing parent-union before writing; PIV (Philip IV of France, existing) had no children and is reused as Isabella's father. NOTE: the father of the kaisar John Doukas is a DIFFERENT Andronikos Doukas than the existing node ANDRONIKOSDOUKAS (John's son), so a distinct id SPE_ANDRONIKOSDOUKAS_ELDER is used. SKIPPED (parents genuinely unknown/obscure): MANUELEROTIKOS (Komnenos origins obscure), CRIN/Crinan of Dunkeld (parentage uncertain), CONSTANTINEANGELOS (humble Philadelphian origins, parents unrecorded).

families.note: Rollo's father is SAGA-ONLY and even the identification is disputed; added flagged, mother unknown, no siblings (saga siblings are half-brothers by concubines).
